Premium WPC Fluted Panel · 2900 × 160mm

Texture That
Defines a Wall

9 fluted panel designs — precision-engineered linear grooves that add depth, warmth, and architectural character to feature walls, TV walls, and entrances.

Browse Collection Visit Our Showroom
Real Installations
Honey Bamboo & Graphite Charcoal

WPC Fluted Panel offers a striking contemporary accent with a precision-engineered linear design that adds depth and texture to any interior space. The high-quality composite material ensures lightweight durability while maintaining a consistent, sophisticated architectural finish.

Moisture-resistant & scratch-proof. Ideal for high-use areas such as living rooms, hallways, entrances, and commercial spaces — engineered for simple, interlocking installation that masks wall imperfections.

Technical Specification

Precision-Engineered
Fluted Profile

Every WPC Fluted Panel features a consistent groove profile with an interlocking design that creates a seamless appearance across the whole wall — masking imperfections while adding thermal and acoustic insulation.

Ask About Installation
Panel Length2900mm
Panel Width160mm
Groove Depth23mm
Core MaterialWood Plastic Composite
InstallationInterlocking System
